SEARCH
Package graph

Class TextMergeAgent

java.lang.Object
graph.BinOpAgent
graph.TextMergeAgent
All Implemented Interfaces:
Agent
public class TextMergeAgent extends BinOpAgent
An event-driven agent that performs non-mathematical string concatenation on both text and numeric payloads received from two input topics.

It extends BinOpAgent to inherit structural registration paths, but overrides execution methods to operate on string values (supporting mixed text and mathematical outputs).

Code Integration Example:


 String[] subscriptions = { "text_prefix", "numeric_result" };
 String[] publications = { "final_message" };
 
 // Create and register the text-merging agent
 TextMergeAgent merger = new TextMergeAgent(subscriptions, publications);
 
 // Publish a text string to the first topic
 TopicManagerSingleton.get().getTopic("text_prefix").publish(new Message("The final calculation is:"));
 
 // Publish a numeric calculation output to the second topic
 TopicManagerSingleton.get().getTopic("numeric_result").publish(new Message(33.0));
 
 // Output topic "final_message" instantly receives the concatenated string: 
 // "The final calculation is: 33.0"
 
 // Clean up resources when done
 merger.close();
See Also:
  • BinOpAgent
  • TopicManagerSingleton

    Constructs a TextMergeAgent and registers it with the designated input and output topics.

    Description
    void
    callback(String topic, Message msg)
    Receives message updates, caches them as strings, and publishes the concatenated result when both inputs are available.

    Resets the internal text caches back to null.

  • Constructor Details

    • TextMergeAgent

      public TextMergeAgent(String[] subs, String[] pubs)
      Constructs a TextMergeAgent and registers it with the designated input and output topics.
      Parameters:
      subs - the subscription topics array (must contain at least 2 valid topics)
      pubs - the publication topics array (must contain at least 1 valid topic)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if subscription or publication arrays are null or empty

  • Method Details

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets the internal text caches back to null.
      Specified by:
      reset in interface Agent
      Overrides:
      reset in class BinOpAgent

    • callback

      public void callback(String topic, Message msg)
      Receives message updates, caches them as strings, and publishes the concatenated result when both inputs are available.
      Specified by:
      callback in interface Agent
      Overrides:
      callback in class BinOpAgent
      Parameters:
      topic - the name of the topic that dispatched the update
      msg - the immutable message container holding the payload
